chapter_title: Requirements for reporting of Tier 2 expenditure
snippet: Tier 2 expenditure must be spent on capacity, capability and support for students with disability. Schools are required to report all Tier 2 school-level funded expenditure, aligned with the allowable uses of funding and examples provided in this guidance. Reporting should be undertaken at the point of expenditure or monthly. The following resource provides instructions for school administrators to action the reporting requirements in CASES21 and eduPay: Instructions for reporting of Tier 2 expenditure (DOCX) External Link . Tier 2 funding use case studies Case studies for Tier 2 funding use Tier 3 student-level funding Information on Tier 3 student-level funding Information on requirements for reporting of Tier 2 expenditure Reviewed 23 January 2026
